title: Bookings & Orders
description: Manage all orders — confirm, reschedule, cancel.
searchPlaceholder: Search booking code, name, or phone...
loadError: Failed to load orders. Please try again.

completeDialog.title: Mark order as complete?
completeDialog.desc: Order {{kode}} will be marked as "Completed". This action cannot be undone.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel order
cancelDialog.desc: Order {{kode}} will be marked as "Canceled". Manual refund notes (off-platform) are recorded here.
cancelDialog.alasanPlaceholder: E.g. client canceled themselves, refund already transferred manually...

rescheduleDialog.title: Reschedule order
rescheduleDialog.desc: Pick a new date & time for order {{kode}}. The slot will be re-validated by the server.
rescheduleDialog.conflictNote: If the chosen slot is already taken, the server will reject it and show a message — please pick another time.

toast.completeConflict: Order status changed before it could be marked complete.
toast.cancelConflict: Order status changed before it could be canceled.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm this payment?
confirmDialog.desc: The payment of {{jumlah}} will be confirmed and the booking status updated automatically.

rejectDialog.title: Reject payment proof
rejectDialog.desc: Explain the rejection reason — the client can re-upload proof after this.
rejectDialog.alasanPlaceholder: E.g. amount doesn't match, proof is unreadable...

markCash.title: Mark as Paid in Cash

desc.DP: Record the deposit as paid in cash on-site (no uploaded proof). The booking status will change to "Confirmed".
desc.PELUNASAN: Record the final payment as paid in cash on-site (no uploaded proof). The booking status will change to "Paid".

markCash.descFallback: The current booking status doesn't allow cash payment.
markCash.catatanPlaceholder: E.g. paid in cash during the makeup session

toast.confirmConflict: Payment status changed before it could be confirmed.
toast.rejectConflict: Payment status changed before it could be rejected.
toast.markCashConflict: Booking status changed before it could be marked as cash.
